Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

Full_Payload_Orderno AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber AS DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customerno AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Entries_Appliedloyaltypoints AS APPLIED_LOYALTY_POINT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Apportionedheaderdiscount AS HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Apportionedheaderdiscountnet AS HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT_NET_VALUE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Articleno AS ARTICLE_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Entries_Ean AS ITEM_EAN_CODE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Entrystatus AS ITEM_STATUS,

Full_Payload_Entries_Gcrsticketno AS GCRS_TICKET_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Entries_Globalproductcode AS GLOBAL_PRODUCT_CODE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Isitemtaxable AS ITEM_TAXABLE_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Entries_Isreviewable AS ITEM_REVIEWED_FLAG,

Full_Payload_Entries_Orderavaildateitem AS ITEM_AVAILABILITY_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Entries_Orderitemid AS ITEM_ID_FROM_MARKETPLACE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Orderitemtype AS ITEM_TYPE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Plantid AS PLANT_ID,

Full_Payload_Entries_Productsetcode AS PRODUCT_SET_CODE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Quantity AS ITEM_QUANTITY,

Full_Payload_Entries_Quantityunit AS UNIT_OF_MEASURE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salestext AS ITEM_DESCRIPTION,

Full_Payload_Entries_Sellableproductcode AS MARKET_SELLABLE_CODE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Serial AS ASSET_SERIAL_NUMBER,

Full_Payload_Entries_Stockassign AS STOCK_ASSIGMENT,

full_payload_entries_storageLocation AS STORAGE_LOCATION,

Full_Payload_Entries_Wbselement AS WBS_ELEMENT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Currency AS ITEM_CURRENCY,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Exemptamount AS ITEM_EXEMPT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Gross AS GROSS_PRICE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Grossoriginal AS GROSS_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Grossperunit AS GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Grossperunitoriginal AS GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Net AS NET_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Netoriginal AS NET_PRICE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Netperunit AS NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Netperunitoriginal AS NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Taxableamount AS TAXABLE_AMOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Taxcalculated AS CALCULATED_TAX,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Vat_Originalitemvatvalue AS TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Vat_Originalvatperunit AS TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL_BEFORE_DISCOUNT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Vat_Vatperunit AS VAT_PER_UNIT,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Vat_Vatrate AS VAT_RATE,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Vat_Vatvalue AS VAT_VALUE,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: Full_Payload_Orderno, Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME TEXT,
APPLIED_LOYALTY_POINT DECIMAL,
HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT INTEGER,
HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT_NET_VALUE INTEGER,
ARTICLE_NUMBER INTEGER,
ITEM_EAN_CODE TEXT,
ITEM_STATUS TEXT,
GCRS_TICKET_NUMBER TEXT,
GLOBAL_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
ITEM_TAXABLE_FLAG TEXT,
ITEM_REVIEWED_FLAG TEXT,
ITEM_AVAILABILITY_DATETIME DATETIME,
ITEM_ID_FROM_MARKETPLACE TEXT,
ITEM_TYPE TEXT,
PLANT_ID TEXT,
PRODUCT_SET_CODE TEXT,
ITEM_QUANTITY INTEGER,
UNIT_OF_MEASURE TEXT,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
MARKET_SELLABLE_CODE TEXT,
ASSET_SERIAL_NUMBER TEXT,
STOCK_ASSIGMENT TEXT,
STORAGE_LOCATION TEXT,
WBS_ELEMENT TEXT,
ITEM_CURRENCY TEXT,
ITEM_EXEMPT DECIMAL,
GROSS_PRICE DECIMAL,
GROSS_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT DECIMAL,
GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
NET_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
NET_PRICE DECIMAL,
NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT DECIMAL,
NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
TAXABLE_AMOUNT DECIMAL,
CALCULATED_TAX DECIMAL,
TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL DECIMAL,
TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL_BEFORE_DISCOUNT DECIMAL,
VAT_PER_UNIT DECIMAL,
VAT_RATE DECIMAL,
VAT_VALUE DECIMAL,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_I primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM set comment = 'This table includes orders from several channels, one line per order item. ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK is
'Indicates the index of the item';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Customer number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Time of the order creation';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.APPLIED_LOYALTY_POINT is
'Number of points that the customer spent on the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT is
'It indicates the portion of promotion at order level split on the single item';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.HEADER_LEVEL_DISCOUNT_NET_VALUE is
'Apportioned header discount - net value';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ARTICLE_NUMBER is
'Article number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_EAN_CODE is
'EAN code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_STATUS is
'Takes values: approved, ready to enrich, waiting for approval, etc.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GCRS_TICKET_NUMBER is
'GCRS ticket number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Global Product Code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_TAXABLE_FLAG is
'Informs whether the item is taxable';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_REVIEWED_FLAG is
'It indicates if a product can be reviewed or not';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_AVAILABILITY_DATETIME is
'Date of order availability';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_ID_FROM_MARKETPLACE is
'The orderItemId imported from the marketplace';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_TYPE is
'Type of the item, examples: ZARE, ZRKR';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.PLANT_ID is
'plant Id';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.PRODUCT_SET_CODE is
'Product set code, examples: EGStarterKit, KitSanValentin3DUOCobre';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_QUANTITY is
'Total number of items in the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.UNIT_OF_MEASURE is
'Unit of measure for the item (e.g. sticks, pieces, etc.),';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_DESCRIPTION is
'Sales text, description of the item';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.MARKET_SELLABLE_CODE is
'Sellable code generated at market level, market specific';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ASSET_SERIAL_NUMBER is
'Asset Serial Number (Relevant in case of return order)';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.STOCK_ASSIGMENT is
'Stock assignment parameter';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.STORAGE_LOCATION is
'Storage Location';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.WBS_ELEMENT is
'Used for reclassification for the sales allowance/discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_CURRENCY is
'Currency of the interaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ITEM_EXEMPT is
'exempt on item level';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GROSS_PRICE is
'Gross price: total price of the items plus all discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GROSS_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Entry gross unit price (without discounts applied)';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT is
'Gross per unit: total price of the item unit plus discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.GROSS_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Gross per unit original: base price of the item unit plus discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.NET_PRICE_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Total new price of the item ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.NET_PRICE is
'Net original: total price of the item minus sales tax and plus all discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT is
'Net price per unit: total price of the item unit minus sales tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.NET_PRICE_PER_UNIT_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Total price of the item unit minus the sales tax and plus all discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.TAXABLE_AMOUNT is
'item value base for sales tax';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.CALCULATED_TAX is
'tax calculated by Avalara on Item level';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL is
'Tax value applied to the item total price plus item discounts';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.TAX_ON_ITEM_LEVEL_BEFORE_DISCOUNT is
'Tax value applied to the item base price ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.VAT_PER_UNIT is
'VAT per unit: tax value applied to the base price of the item';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.VAT_RATE is
'VAT Rate - value added tax rate for the item';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.VAT_VALUE is
'VAT value: total value added tax * product quantity';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

CKC_VALID_TO_TDE_HYBR

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM
